data.content: Shipment complete. `main` was fast-forwarded to `7de78183e46d8aa7666609302fb44af34b224b85` and pushed to `origin/main`. Remote GitHub workflows for that commit both succeeded on 2026-04-19: `CI` run `24623450031` finished green in 1m45s and `Coverage Badge` run `24623450037` finished green in 51s. GitHub emitted coverage-regression annotations during CI, but the workflow conclusion was success.
